prestazioni: VK56VD (5.6L V8) engine: Full forged internals upgrade with Manley 4340 steel connecting rods, JE Pistons 9.0:1 compression forged pistons, and ACL Race Series main/rod bearings to handle 800+ HP on E85. Pair with a custom camshaft grind from Crower Cams (230°/236° duration, 0.600" lift) for optimized torque in the 2,500-5,500 RPM range, critical for towing and off-road torque delivery.

Forced induction: Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285X turbocharger (85mm inducer, 1.28 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 4" stainless steel downpipe and Vibrant Performance 1000HP intercooler core (42" x 12" x 4.5"). Boost controlled via an AEM X-Series wastegate actuator and tuned with an AEM Infinity 8 standalone ECU, targeting 18-22 PSI on E85 with a 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust featuring Borla Pro XS mufflers for backpressure optimization.

Drivetrain reinforcement: Nissan Titan-specific Z1 Motorsports billet aluminum differential cover with ARP differential studs, paired with a Yukon Gear & Axle 4.88:1 ring and pinion set for improved crawl ratio. Front and rear axles upgraded to Chromoly 35-spline axles from RCV Performance, with a custom-fabricated 1.5" thick aluminum skid plate protecting the transfer case and differentials.
estetica: Body reinforcement: Custom-fabricated steel tube front bumper from CBI Offroad, designed to clear a 35" Nitto Trail Grappler M/T tire with a 12,000 lb Warn Zeon 12-S winch. Rear bumper replaced with a Fab Fours Vengeance rear bumper featuring dual swing-out arms for a RotopaX 7-gallon fuel cell and a Hi-Lift Jack mount.

Suspension lift: Icon Vehicle Dynamics Stage 5 suspension kit with 2.5" coilovers (285/75R17 tire clearance) and remote reservoirs, paired with Icon 1.0" extended travel rear leaf springs and Fox 2.0 Performance Series IFP shocks. Fender flares replaced with Bushwacker Cut-Out Style flares in matte black, trimmed to fit 35" tires with a 1.5" wheel spacer for zero scrub.

Aerodynamics and lighting: Custom front splitter from Rieger Tuning (carbon fiber, 3-piece) with integrated LED light bar from Baja Designs (Squadron Pro, 50" width). Rear over-fender vents from Rally Innovations to reduce wheel well pressure, paired with a custom-fabricated aluminum roof rack from Prinsu Design Studio, supporting a 40" Rigid Industries LED light bar and a 50W auxiliary air compressor.
